prompts.task: Scan the Go chi service in ./service for observability gaps. Do not modify files.
Produce an observability readiness review for the Go chi service in ./service. Identify existing telemetry, missing OpenTelemetry coverage, and the next instrumentation step. Do not modify files.

deterministic_checks.description: Final report identifies Go as the language.
Final report identifies chi as the HTTP framework.
Final report notes missing OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
Final report recommends the instrumentation skill.
Audit run does not create a generated OTel setup file.

qualitative_checks: Identifies main.go as the entry point.
Enumerates the HTTP routes: GET /health, GET /tasks, GET /tasks/{id}, POST /tasks, PATCH /tasks/{id}, DELETE /tasks/{id}.
Reports no OTel SDK initialization and no go.opentelemetry.io dependencies.
Calls out missing HTTP server spans, request duration, request rate, error visibility, and OTLP exporter wiring.
Mentions otelhttp or otelchi as the appropriate Go HTTP instrumentation path.
